overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the sunlit palace gardens of Beauclair. The character traverses cobblestone paths, passes through ornate metal archways, and explores a grand plaza with fountains and statues, with the distinctive white-stone palace visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone garden path with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the garden path, passing NPCs and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue clothing leaning against the wooden fence
NPC in red tunic walking toward the camera along the path

entered.detail: irregular stone paving forming the walkway
weathered wooden railing along the left side of the path
ornate carved stone column with decorative base
lush manicured hedge rows with flowering bushes
white stone palace with red roofs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a cobblestone garden path bordered by a wooden fence on the left and lush green hedges with red flowers on the right. The Beauclair palace is visible in the distance, and a few NPCs are encountered walking along the path.

events.description: passing through ornate metal garden archway covered in vines
emerging from shaded path into bright sunlit plaza with full palace view

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the garden archway, approaching the palace plaza

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress walking past the camera toward the palace

entered.detail: black wrought iron archway covered in climbing vines
open paved terrace area with patterned stonework

segments.scene_description: The path leads through an ornate metal archway covered in vines, opening up to reveal the grand Beauclair palace in full view. Geralt emerges into a sunlit stone plaza area, passing a woman in period dress, with the palace now dominating the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace courtyard with fountain and statues overlooking mountains

events.description: ascending wide stone staircase toward upper garden terrace
moving from central plaza into upper garden path with mountain views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks up the stone stairs and explores the upper terraces, passing various NPCs in the palace courtyard

notable_agents.action: child in red outfit and yellow cap walking up the stairs ahead
man in blue hat and white shirt standing near the fountain

entered.detail: octagonal stone fountain basin in the plaza center
classical stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
wide curved staircase leading up to the palace entrance
snow-capped mountains visible in the background beyond the palace
elaborate Gothic stone archway with pointed spires

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the grand palace courtyard featuring a central stone fountain and classical statues. He ascends the wide stone stairs toward the palace, passing a child and other NPCs, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background beyond the ornate Gothic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded garden path that gradually opens into the expansive, sunlit courtyard of the Beauclair palace. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path bordered by wooden fences and lush red flowers, with the palace appearing as a distant silhouette. As the path leads forward, the camera passes through a vine-covered metal archway, causing the scene to expand into a bright stone plaza where the grand palace now dominates the skyline. The movement then flows into the heart of the palace courtyard, passing a central stone fountain and classical statues before ascending wide stone stairs. Finally, the perspective opens further to reveal the ornate Gothic architecture of the palace set against a backdrop of distant snow-capped mountains.
